name: Chicken Curry Rice Salad
recipeIngredient: 3 cups Cooked rice (cooled), cooked in chicken broth
recipeInstructions:
1. In a medium bowl, combine yogurt, 2 tablespoons curry powder, garlic, salt, and ground red pepper. Mix well.
2. Add chicken breasts to the mixture and stir to coat evenly.
3. Cover the bowl and refrigerate for 4 to 6 hours to allow the chicken to marinate.
4. Grill or broil the marinated chicken until cooked through, then cut into strips and refrigerate.
5. In a large bowl, combine cooled rice with the remaining 1 tablespoon curry powder, red pepper, red onion, snow peas, green onions, raisins, and chopped peanuts. Mix well and cover.
6. Refrigerate for one hour to allow flavors to meld.
7. Pour the light Italian dressing over the salad and toss gently until combined.
8. To serve, place chicken strips on top of the salad.
